title: Plush Teddy
description: Add a soft and adorable teddy bear decoration to your world.
body:
**Plush Teddy is a lightweight decorative mod that adds an adorable plush teddy bear to your world.**
Place it in bedrooms, living rooms, or children’s spaces to bring a soft and cozy atmosphere to your builds.

The mod focuses on visual detail while maintaining a vanilla-friendly style, offering a charming decoration option without changing gameplay balance.
Perfect for both survival and creative players who want to make their homes feel warmer and more lively.
![Plush Teddy](https://files.seeusercontent.com/2026/02/22/eqI9/c4d98c7.png)  
### Recipe
![teddy_bear_recipe.png](https://files.seeusercontent.com/2026/02/22/y6oR/teddy_bear_recipe.png)

    
**For the detailed information, please read the minute contents below. THANKS!!!**
